results.title: OpenClaw memory overview
results.snippet: OpenClaw stores memory in durable files, then layers BM25, vectors, and hybrid retrieval on top for recall.

results.title: OpenClaw temporal ranking notes
results.snippet: The design includes temporal decay and recency weighting so newer memory receives higher priority during retrieval.

results.title: OpenClaw progressive disclosure
results.snippet: The agent first finds candidate memories, then fetches the full memory body only when needed. This keeps prompts smaller.
